channel.title: Rubric Evaluator on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Rubric Evaluator on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Rubric evaluator in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry now offers rubric evaluators in public preview for single-turn and multi-turn agent flows. They let developers define context-specific evaluation criteria with agent prompts for assessing agent quality.

  • Source: Azure Updates
